title: Variables and Data Types
summary: Learn how to name variables, assign values, and recognize common data types.
content_html:
A variable is a name that points to a value. Python infers the data type from the value you assign.

name = "Minh"
age = 20
score = 8.5
is_active = True

exercises.title: Identify the data type
exercises.prompt: Which data type does the value 8.5 use?

exercises.title: Valid variable name
exercises.prompt: Enter a valid variable name for storing a user's age.

exercises.title: Print a personal value
exercises.prompt: Create a variable named name with the value Minh, then print it.
